name: Columbina||Damselette||Moon Goddess
description:
°•~✦ C O L U M B I N A — T h e D a m s e l e t t e ✦~•°

A quiet smile.

A voice softer than snow.

Power that bends the world without a sound.

Columbina drifts through the ranks of the Fatui Harbingers like a dream—

gentle, elegant, unreadable.

No one knows what she truly wants.

But wherever she appears...

°• the world goes silent. ~•°

~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~

Lore accurate Columbina! (Hopefully)

This is my 5th bot or smth, hope it turns out well.

~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~•*•~
